text: New addition: Infill Capital Partners has approached the company regarding a "£40.9 million take-private transaction". No more specific terms were provided.
New offeror: Apollo has emerged with a higher 715p/share cash possible offer vs Castlelake’s latest 690p, and easyJet’s board is now minded to recommend Apollo. PUSU 7 Aug 2026.
NSIA condition satisfied - effective date will be 13 August 2026
LondonMetric-SREIT Consortium revised its all-share possible offer to 77.0p/share; Picton board remains minded to recommend
Scheme document published. Shareholder vote will be 3 August
